### 2. Professional Black & White Design 🎨

**Classic, Premium Aesthetics:**
- Pure black text on white background

- Name: 18pt bold (prominent)

### 3. Optimal Spacing & Layout 📐

**Strategic Spacing:**
- Section spacing: 5mm between sections

- Bullet indent: 5mm for clarity

- Horizontal line under header (elegant separator)

**Content Distribution:**
- Header: Name, contact, links (well-spaced)
- Summary: Full paragraph (substantial)
- Skills: 4 categories (comprehensive)
- Experience: 2 detailed projects (impressive)
- Projects: 2 projects with multiple bullets
- Education: 2 entries (complete background)
- Certifications: 2 entries (credentials)
